{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Northstrider's pocket world
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's pocket world]] is a miniature version of [[Ghostwater]] consisting of sand, seaweed, a forest of blades, a cave with two wells, and a fenced-off living area.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] trained inside [[Northstrider's pocket world]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
